title: task
description: routing.rs:25-27 - seq_is_newer() uses simple signed wrap-around ((new.wrapping_sub(old) as i8) > 0) but RFC 6550 Section 9.1 says DAOSequence is a lollipop counter like DODAG version. The version_is_newer() in dodag.rs correctly handles linear/circular regions, but seq_is_newer does not. Failure: when last_seq=128 (circular) and new_seq=127 (linear restart), seq_is_newer(127,128) returns false (127-128=-1 as i8), but lollipop semantics says linear is always newer than circular, so it should return true. Stale routes could overwrite fresh ones during sequence restart.
close_reason: Fixed: replaced signed wrap-around with proper RFC 6550 lollipop semantics for seq_is_newer(). Linear region (0-127) is now correctly treated as newer than circular region (128-255), preventing stale routes from overwriting fresh ones during sequence restart.
